---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or new slice
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem or motivation

A clear description of what problem this solves or what value it adds.

## Proposed solution

What you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Slice / phase alignment

Which slice or phase does this belong to?

- [ ] Concept / spec update only
- [ ] New slice (add to `project-documents/user/slices/`)
- [ ] Enhancement to existing slice

## Affected areas

- [ ] Backend / API
- [ ] Frontend / UI
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional context

Any other notes, screenshots, or links.
